title: How to Use Claude Code for Free with Gemini, DeepSeek & OpenRouter
excerpt: Learn how to use Claude Code with free AI models like Gemini and DeepSeek using OpenRouter. Complete setup guide in under 2 minutes.
content: Claude Code is one of the most powerful AI coding assistants, but many users think they need an Anthropic subscription to use it. In reality, you can connect Claude Code to OpenRouter and access free models like Gemini and DeepSeek. This guide walks you through the complete setup process.
seo_title: How to Get Free Lovable Premium Credits via LinkedIn Premium
seo_description: Complete guide to unlock Lovable Premium and free AI credits using LinkedIn Premium partner benefits.
seo_keywords: lovable premium free, lovable credits free, linkedin premium benefits, free ai tools, lovable ai credits
author: Midhun NK

subtopics.title: 1. Activate LinkedIn Premium First
subtopics.details: Before accessing Lovable partner rewards, make sure your LinkedIn Premium subscription is active.

subtopics.title: 2. Open LinkedIn Premium Benefits
subtopics.details: Inside the LinkedIn Premium dashboard, navigate to the partner offers or benefits section where additional rewards are listed.

subtopics.title: 3. Find the Lovable Premium Offer
subtopics.details: Look for the Lovable AI partner offer inside the benefits section. Some users receive free premium access along with bonus AI credits.

subtopics.title: 4. Login or Create a Lovable Account
subtopics.details: To redeem the offer, login using your existing Lovable account or create a new one.

subtopics.title: 5. Claim Free Premium Credits
subtopics.details: After activation, the free premium credits will be added to your Lovable account automatically if the offer is available.

subtopics.title: 6. Important Notes About the Offer
subtopics.details: LinkedIn partner offers can change anytime depending on promotions, country, or account eligibility. If the Lovable offer is unavailable, check again later because offers rotate frequently.
